name: cyber-neo
description: Open-source cybersecurity analysis agent. Scans any local project for vulnerabilities: code security (SAST), dependency CVEs (SCA), secret leaks, authentication/authorization flaws, cryptographic weaknesses, misconfigurations, supply chain risks, and CI/CD security. Covers all OWASP 2025 Top 10 and CWE Top 25 categories. Generates prioritized reports with remediation guidance. Invoke with /cyber-neo [path].
